The Associate Manufacturing Engineer (Flight Assurance) will be a critical role to scaling production of one of their satellite constellations in a high-growth, cleanroom manufacturing environment.

This job opens for applications on 10/27/25. Applications for this job will be accepted for at least 30 days from the posting date.
